overall_summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is undergoing significant architectural refinement and infrastructure maturing, focusing on advanced multi-agent orchestration, cloud stability, and deep DeFi integrations like the proposed Kamino plugin. Progress in late May and early June highlights a pivot toward professional-grade cloud services, including containerized agent sandboxing and automated metered billing.
key_facts: PR #8116 was merged to promote the develop branch to main, syncing production with the Cloud V2 stack changes.
The project implemented metered billing and per-inference spend tracking in elizaos/eliza to support a mature cloud-hosting model.
A comprehensive Kamino plugin for ElizaOS was proposed to enable DeFi actions on Solana including lending, borrowing, and liquidity management.
All plugin development has been centralized into the elizaos/eliza repository, with developers directed to target the develop branch.
Security researcher marsel_51932 introduced services for ElizaOS focusing on preventing prompt injection and agent draining.
The organizational relationship between ElizaOS and Hyperia was clarified; Hyperia is a separate team founded by Shaw but currently operates independently.
PR #8080 introduced an agent-surface framework making plugin views agent-controllable and enabling sleep/wake lifecycle endpoints.
DAPPCRAFT initiated contact to explore a collaboration between ElizaOS and an AI DePIN project valued at approximately 0.5 billion FDV.
A major effort was completed to align all plugins with an ESM-first architecture to ensure ecosystem compatibility.
open_questions: Does the Staging VM cloud-init template pre-install node 24 and the cloud-shared symlink yet?

twitter_news_highlights.claim: Odilitime shared a link to an upcoming Twitter Space event scheduled for early June.

new_issues_prs.title: feat(plugin-task-coordinator): odysseus-style orchestrator UI
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Introduces a rich React-based chat-shell UI for the multi-agent orchestrator.

new_issues_prs.title: Claude/agentic views surface
new_issues_prs.author: lalalune
new_issues_prs.significance: Ships sleep/wake cycle endpoints and makes plugin views agent-controllable.

new_issues_prs.title: orchestrator: sub-agent completion narration drops/garbles the deliverable
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Identifies a presentation defect where sub-agent outputs are truncated or buried.

overall_focus.claim: The development focus has shifted toward Cloud V2 infrastructure stabilization, hardening agent runtimes for headless environments, and enhancing the multi-agent orchestrator UI and logic.

discord_updates.summary: Focus on high-level architecture and community networking. Marsel introduced security auditing services, while Intuition Box discussed upcoming developer bounties.
Technical coordination on the Kamino Solana plugin and enforcement of the new unified repository structure for plugins.
Strategic outreach from DAPPCRAFT regarding a potential collaboration with a high-valuation AI DePIN project.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users expressed a need for clearer distinction between ecosystem components like ElizaCloud, Milady, and Waifu, which was addressed through detailed architectural architectural explanations.

strategic_insights.insight: The transition to metered billing and private containerization indicates ElizaOS is moving toward a commercial-grade SaaS model for AI agents.
implications_or_questions: How will this impact the existing open-source community's access to the framework?

strategic_insights.insight: The proposal for a deep Kamino integration suggests ElizaOS aims to move beyond simple chat agents toward autonomous economic actors capable of managing complex financial positions.
implications_or_questions: What risk management safeguards are needed for autonomous lending/borrowing?

market_analysis.observation: High-interest collaboration proposal from an AI DePIN project with 0.5B FDV.
market_analysis.relevance: Validates ElizaOS's strategic importance in the decentralized AI infrastructure (DePIN) sector.
